---
name: logic-gap-review
description: Use when reviewing a paper or academic document for unsupported inferential jumps, hidden assumptions, and weak claim-to-evidence links.
---

# Logic Gap Review

1. Read `agents/skills/logic-gap-review.md`.
1. Fix the document's central claim and main subclaims before reviewing.
1. Check each claim against its cited evidence, derivation, or prior paragraph conclusion.
1. Treat unsupported jumps, hidden assumptions, and blurred result-vs-interpretation boundaries as findings.
